scores.notes: Key issues: 'BOOK TA .K' missing a dot, 'SDN BHD' merged without space, address has typos ('I8' instead of '18', '61100' instead of '81100', 'BAHRO' instead of 'BAHRU'), extra irrelevant text (e.g., 'tan woon yann', 'Cashier MANIS').
